meaning: n.防空壕,独木舟,棒球场边供球员休息的地方
examples: A suspender found in a German dugout.
Dugout canoes a popular means of transport.
The dugout canoes drift silently along the waters, past mud-banks and screeching birds.
In the dugout, even a few Yankees got jumpy when the thunder boomed and lightning crackled.
Exploding from the dugout, he had to be restrained from physically attacking the umpire.
